description: The copied fixtures do not contain any GPD/phases/* directories. gpd phase list is empty, gpd phase index 01 still validates the empty scaffold, but gpd phase validate-waves 01 and gpd verify phase 01 both return Phase not found.
exact_precondition: A phase inventory must be materialized before verify phase or phase validate-waves can bind to phase 01; this fixture pair does not provide it.
replay_steps: Copy the positive and mutation fixture workspaces into a fresh run root.
Run uv run gpd --raw --cwd <workspace> phase list.
Run uv run gpd --raw --cwd <workspace> phase index 01.
Run uv run gpd --raw --cwd <workspace> phase validate-waves 01.
Run uv run gpd --raw --cwd <workspace> verify phase 01.
classification_impact: No product-local comparison is reachable from this scaffold; the failure is entirely determined by the missing phase inventory contract.

trigger: First sandboxed uv probe before escalation
observed_failure: error: failed to open file `/Users/sergio/.cache/uv/sdists-v9/.git`: Operation not permitted (os error 1)
exact_unblock_condition: Rerun the same uv command with unrestricted access so uv can read and populate its cache, or bypass the sandboxed cache boundary.
